lines.speaker: Mal
lines.line: Reckon we got a couple hours 'til we touch down on the dirt.

next_player_options: Do you think they'll be friendly out there?
Any chance the engines are running smooth?

history.speaker: Mal
history.line: Reckon we got a couple hours 'til we touch down on the dirt.

lines.speaker: Mal
lines.line: Got enough to keep us from starvin', but ain't nothin' fancy.

lines.speaker: Kaylee
lines.line: Doesn't matter to me! I'm cookin' up somethin' mighty tasty.

lines.speaker: Jayne
lines.line: Hope it's got beef in it. Or I'm walkin' off the ship.

next_player_options: Can you give us a peek at the crates?
You really think they'll feed us good meat?
Just glad we ain't crashin' into a rock.
